title: Article from UW–Madison’s Turner offers new framework for justice-oriented public education in a multiracial democracy
summary_en: A new article by Erica O. Turner, associate professor in the Department of Educational Policy Studies at UW–Madison, offers a timely rethinking of what educational justice for all should look like in today’s multiracial democracy.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校特纳的文章为多种族民主国家正义导向公共教育提供新框架

title: UW–Madison entomology research to anchor new learning game
summary_en: UW–Madison entomology professor Claudio Gratton had wanted to make an educational video game about insects for years. He believed a game would be an incredible way to engage young learners with the important research he does on insect diversity.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校昆虫学研究将为新型学习游戏提供核心支撑
summary_cn: 无对应待翻译原文内容

title: School of Education graduate students recognized with 2025–26 Teaching Assistant Awards
summary_en: Thirty-two graduate students have been selected as recipients of the 2025–26 Campus-Wide Teaching Assistant Awards, recognizing their excellence in teaching. Among this year’s honorees are four graduate students from the School of Education.
title_cn: 教育学院研究生获评2025-2026学年教学助理奖

title: UW–Madison’s Popkewitz receives Fulbright Specialist Award
summary_en: UW–Madison’s Thomas S. Popkewitz, a professor in the School of Education’s Department of Curriculum and Instruction, has received a Fulbright Specialist Program award.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校波普凯维茨获富布赖特专家奖
summary_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校教育学院课程与教学系教授托马斯·S·波普凯维茨近日获颁富布赖特专家奖，将赴南非约翰内斯堡大学开展相关合作交流活动。富布赖特专家项目由美国国务院教育与文化事务局资助，是富布赖特系列交流项目的重要组成部分，项目遴选资深美国学者、专业人士与境外合作机构结对，推动专业知识分享、机构联系强化及长期合作伙伴关系构建。波普凯维茨是课程研究、教育史、教育社会学领域的知名学者，此次获奖后他将在约翰内斯堡大学开展为期两周的工作，包括举办专题研讨会、发表公开演讲、与该校教研人员围绕教育公平、课程改革等主题开展合作研究。波普凯维茨的研究聚焦教育政策与实践的社会历史语境，重点探究逻辑体系如何影响边缘群体的教育成效，此前他已多次获得富布赖特相关奖项，曾在欧洲、亚洲、非洲多所高校担任客座职务。

title: Dance Department presents Repertory Concert 2026
summary_en: The UW–Madison Dance Department presents its Repertory Concert 2026, featuring work from Omari Carter, Bradford Chin, Aaron Loux, Anna Peretz Rogovoy, Liz Sexe, and Collette Stewart. Performances will take place April 23–25 in the Margaret H’Doubler Performance Space, Lathrop Hall.
title_cn: 舞蹈系举办2026年度保留剧目汇演

title: ELPA higher education faculty member Xueli Wang wins inaugural UW–Madison graduate student mentoring award
summary_en: Xueli Wang was one of just six faculty members campus-wide to be chosen for the The Graduate School’s inaugural Faculty Award for Excellence in Graduate Student Mentoring.
title_cn: ELPA高等教育方向教职人员王雪丽荣获威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校首届研究生指导奖

title: Building research leaders: A new model for empowering undergraduates to strengthen research teams
summary_en: At the Center for Research on Complex Thinking (CRCT) in UW–Madison's School of Education, undergraduates routinely perform at a graduate-student level and help train faculty and researchers from around the world.
title_cn: 培养科研领军人才：赋能本科生强化科研团队的新模式
